title: Free Quotation Generator
metaTitle: Free Quotation Generator · Create & Download Quotes Online · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Create professional quotations online for free. Add your items, set any currency and VAT rate, and download a print-ready PDF in seconds. No signup required.
keywords: free quotation generator, quote maker, create quotation online, free quote template, download quotation pdf, vat quotation generator, price quote maker
heroSubtitle: Send a polished price quote in seconds. Add your line items, pick any currency, apply VAT or sales tax, then download a clean PDF. No account needed.

howToSteps.name: Add your details
howToSteps.text: Enter your company name, the client, a quotation number, date and validity.

howToSteps.name: Add line items
howToSteps.text: List the products or services you are quoting, with quantity and rate. Totals calculate automatically.

howToSteps.name: Set currency & tax
howToSteps.text: Choose any currency and set your VAT or sales-tax rate.

howToSteps.name: Download PDF
howToSteps.text: Click download to save a print-ready PDF, or sign up to send it and convert it to an invoice in one click.

features.title: Instant & free
features.desc: No signup, no watermark, no limits. Send as many quotations as you need.

features.title: Any currency
features.desc: Quote in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR, GBP and more, with correct decimals.

features.title: VAT & tax ready
features.desc: Apply any VAT or sales-tax rate, calculated automatically on the net.

sections.title: Why use the Paper & Pen quotation generator?
sections.body: It is genuinely free, works in any currency, and produces a clean, professional PDF that wins more business than a plain spreadsheet. Add validity dates and terms so clients know exactly what they are approving.

sections.title: Turn a winning quote into an invoice
sections.body: When a client accepts, you do not want to retype anything. Inside the full Paper & Pen ERP, an approved quotation converts to a sales order or invoice in one click, with totals, tax and line items carried over.
items: Track sent, accepted and expired quotes
Convert to invoice or sales order instantly
Send by WhatsApp or email and get notified when viewed

faqs.q: Is the quotation generator really free?
faqs.a: Yes. It is completely free with no signup, no watermark and no limit on the number of quotations you create.

faqs.q: What is the difference between a quotation and an invoice?
faqs.a: A quotation is a price offer you send before work begins. An invoice is the request for payment after. You can build both here for free.

faqs.q: Can I set a validity date on my quote?
faqs.a: Yes. Add a validity period and your own terms so the client knows how long the price holds and what they are agreeing to.

faqs.q: How do I convert an accepted quote to an invoice?
faqs.a: Download the PDF for free, or create a free Paper & Pen workspace to convert an accepted quote into an invoice or sales order in one click.

ctaTitle: Win the job, then bill it
ctaSub: Send quotes, track acceptance and convert to invoices in one click with a free Paper & Pen workspace.
